info.title: S&P 500 Stocks: 25 Years of Data (Updated Daily)
info.subtitle: OHLCV for all ~500 constituents from 2000 to today — 3M+ rows, updated daily
info.description:
Complete daily stock price data (Open, High, Low, Close, Adj Close, Volume) for all current S&P 500 companies from January 2000 to today — over 25 years of market history and 3+ million rows of data.

Two CSV files:

1.  sp500_companies.csv (~500 rows)
   - symbol: Ticker symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT)
   - company: Full company name
   - sector: GICS sector (11 sectors)
   - sub_industry: GICS sub-industry
   - headquarters: City and state
   - date_added: Date added to the S&P 500 index
   - founded: Year founded

2.  sp500_stocks.csv (3M+ rows)
   - date: Trading date
   - open: Opening price
   - high: Daily high
   - low: Daily low
   - close: Closing price
   - adj_close: Adjusted close (accounts for splits and dividends)
   - volume: Trading volume
   - symbol: Ticker symbol

Updated daily via scheduled notebook. First run downloads full history, subsequent runs only fetch the latest week and merge with existing data.

Some tickers have shorter histories — companies are only included from the date they were publicly traded, not from 2000.

Use cases:
- Stock price prediction and time series forecasting
- Portfolio optimization and backtesting
- Sector rotation and market regime analysis
- Volatility modeling (GARCH, realized volatility)
- Pairs trading and statistical arbitrage
- Technical indicator calculation (SMA, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands)
- Deep learning experiments (LSTM, Transformer)
- Financial data science benchmarks
